candidates.why: Separate operating D&A summary line above finance section, but not labelled as cost of sales / cost of revenues / COR / COGS. The selected COGS bucket is only 'Materials and consumables used', so this row is outside that bucket, yet the statement does not show what portion relates to COGS versus SG&A.
Component of the separate D&A disclosure beneath the operating D&A summary. Prefer the summary row over components if any D&A were to be selected.
Component of the separate D&A disclosure beneath the operating D&A summary. Prefer the summary row over components if any D&A were to be selected.
Residual balancing component under the D&A summary, not a preferred standalone choice when the summary row exists.

variables.notes: No row explicitly identifies D&A as COGS-related. Because the only visible D&A is a total operating D&A line, assigning any of it to COGS would be speculative and risks misclassification/double counting.

candidates.why: Separate operating D&A summary line at the same level as 'Employee benefit expenses' and 'Other operating expenses', so it appears outside the selected XSGA component rows rather than embedded within them. However, it is not labelled as SG&A-specific and may include non-SG&A operating D&A.
Component under the separate D&A summary. Do not use when the summary row is present.
Component under the separate D&A summary. Do not use when the summary row is present.
Residual balancing component under the D&A summary, not preferred separately.

variables.notes: Manually Added. The visible D&A is clearly separate from the selected XSGA component rows, but the statement does not indicate whether the total D&A belongs wholly to SG&A or includes COGS/other operating functions. Conservative output is empty to avoid misallocating a company-wide operating D&A total.
